channel.title: 90min on Moh le CATALAN MALIEN

item.title: Corinthians debut electric Nike Total 90 third kit against Flamengo
item.description:
Source : 90MIN

Corinthians and Nike launch a bold Total 90 third kit with black and orange detailing for the 2025/26 season.

Cet article a été généré automatiquement depuis le flux RSS de 90MIN.

item.title: Famous OGC Nice eagle mascot and trainer blasted by sprinkler
item.description:
Source : 90MIN

OGC Nice mascot eagle Mefi and her trainer were hilariously drenched by a rogue sprinkler during a pre-match show before facing Roma.

Cet article a été généré automatiquement depuis le flux RSS de 90MIN.
